findings.title: Maybe AI won't kill SaaS - Cautious Optimism
findings.description: Welcome to Cautious Optimism, a newsletter on tech, business, and power. Modestly upbeat. Thursday. Today we’re taking a small break from our usual format. Instead of a host of topics, we’re looking at earnings reports from Nvidia (chips), Snowflake (data), and Salesforce (SaaS).
